Brand.name: BerberGo
Brand.tagline: A smarter, more premium barbershop booking experience

SEO.defaultDescription: BerberGo is a premium barbershop marketplace with appointments, reviews, direct messaging, and operations dashboards built for launch.

Landing.title: Book your next barbershop visit with an experience inspired by Airbnb and built for speed.
Landing.description: Browse shops, compare photos, services, and reviews, then choose the date that fits your schedule and book instantly with BerberGo.
Landing.fallbackNotice: Live shop data is taking a little longer right now, so we are showing a curated preview while everything reconnects in the background.
Landing.searchTitle: Search by city, service, and date
Landing.featuredDescription: A curated selection of standout barbershops available on BerberGo.
Landing.topRatedDescription: Trusted experiences backed by real customer feedback.
Landing.popularServicesDescription: Fast access to the services customers book most often.
Landing.howItWorksDescription: Three simple steps from discovery to booking and direct messaging.
Landing.testimonialsDescription: Real stories from people who found their go-to barbershop through BerberGo.
Landing.ctaTitle: Running a barbershop ready to grow?
Landing.ctaDescription: Create your shop profile, manage services and bookings, and stay connected with customers and admin in one place.

steps.discoverDescription: Browse shops with strong photography, verified reviews, and smart filters.
steps.bookDescription: Choose your service, barber, and preferred time in just a few taps.
steps.chatDescription: Keep conversations with the shop inside the platform before and after booking.

testimonials.oneQuote: The experience felt much cleaner than phone booking. Everything was clear, from the photos to the timing.
testimonials.twoQuote: I loved seeing prices and reviews before booking, and the direct messaging with the shop was genuinely useful.
testimonials.threeQuote: BerberGo made it easy to pick a shop quickly, especially when I need an after-work appointment.

Auth.loginDescription: Access your customer, shop, or admin workspace based on your role.
Auth.registerDescription: Start as a customer or add your shop and begin receiving bookings and messages.
Auth.ownerNotice: A shop owner account will be created right away. You can complete your shop profile from the dashboard while waiting for admin approval.

Dashboard.sidebarDescription: BerberGo helps you manage bookings, messaging, and discovery in one polished workspace.

Customer.dashboardTitle: Discover the right barbershop for your day
Customer.dashboardDescription: Browse shops, compare prices and ratings, then open the one that fits and book your appointment.
Customer.shopsDescription: A visual browsing grid designed for exploring premium barbershops.
Customer.appointmentsDescription: Track upcoming and past bookings, cancel when needed, and review your visit after completion.
Customer.noAppointmentsDescription: Browse shops, pick the right service, and book your first appointment with ease.
Customer.writeReviewDescription: Share your feedback to help other customers choose with confidence.

Shop.dashboardDescription: Follow today’s bookings, upcoming appointments, and the health of your shop, services, and ratings.
Shop.pendingApprovalTitle: Your shop is waiting for admin approval
Shop.pendingApprovalDescription: You can already update the profile, services, and barbers, but customers will only see the shop after approval.
Shop.nearestAppointmentsDescription: A quick look at the latest and nearest appointments for your shop.
Shop.messagesDescription: Handle customer chats and admin communication from one inbox.

Admin.dashboardDescription: A high-level view of marketplace performance, new shops, and booking activity.
Admin.recentAppointmentsDescription: A quick look at the latest activity across the marketplace.
Admin.messagesDescription: Stay in touch with shops about operations, approvals, and support.

ShopCard.fallbackDescription: A comfortable barbershop experience with carefully selected services.

Filters.emptyDescription: Try adjusting the city, rating, or service filter to find a better fit.

Appointments.detailsDescription: Choose your service, optional barber, date, and time.
Appointments.cancelUnexpected: Something went wrong while cancelling the booking.
Appointments.updateStatusError: Unable to update the appointment status.
Appointments.updateStatusUnexpected: Something went wrong while updating the appointment.
Appointments.noMatchingAppointmentsDescription: New bookings will appear here with actions to confirm, cancel, or update status.

Reviews.title: Reviews
Reviews.empty: No reviews have been published yet.
Reviews.alreadyReviewed: This appointment has already been reviewed.
Reviews.completedOnly: Only completed appointments can be reviewed.

AdminAppointments.emptyDescription: Appointments will appear here for marketplace-wide oversight.

AdminShops.unexpectedUpdateError: Something went wrong while updating this shop.

ShopServices.unexpectedSaveError: Something went wrong while saving the service.
ShopServices.description: Active services appear to customers on the shop page.

ShopBarbers.unexpectedSaveError: Something went wrong while saving the barber.
ShopBarbers.description: Build your team with bios and imagery when needed.
ShopBarbers.emptyBio: No bio has been added yet.

ShopProfile.unexpectedSaveError: An unexpected error occurred while saving.
ShopProfile.basicDescription: Update your shop identity, address, hours, and front-facing imagery.
ShopProfile.openLabel: Shop is currently open for bookings

Map.title: Google Maps Placeholder
Map.placeholderSuffix: to enable the interactive map. For now, coordinates can still be entered manually.
Map.clickToSelect: Click on the map to set the shop location.

Messages.title: Messages
Messages.subtitle: Real-time conversations inside BerberGo
Messages.emptyDescription: Start from a shop page or an appointment and your conversations will show up here.
Messages.selectConversation: Choose a conversation to view messages

Api.mustLogin: You need to log in first.
Api.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
Api.registerOwnerSuccess: Shop owner account created successfully. Complete your shop profile while waiting for admin approval.
Api.emailUsed: This email address is already in use.
Api.bookingCreated: Your booking request has been submitted successfully.
Api.reviewCreated: Your review has been saved successfully.
